description_long: This object is a large, broad-bladed sword with a straight, double-edged blade that tapers to a point. The blade is dark in color and appears to be made of metal, with a subtle texture visible along its length. The hilt features a simple, cylindrical handle with a rounded pommel at the end, and a flat, rectangular guard separating the blade from the handle. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible ornamentation or decorative elements. The proportions suggest it is a heavy, robust weapon, likely intended for two-handed use. The finish is matte and non-reflective, giving it a subdued, functional appearance.
description: A large, dark, double-edged sword with a straight blade, simple cylindrical handle, and flat guard. The design is robust and utilitarian, with a matte finish and no ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad, straight blade, flat guard, and cylindrical handle with a rounded pommel.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and the straight alignment of the handle and guard.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the full length of the blade and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blade and the straight, simple handle.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, straight, dark material, rounded pommel, no visible grip texture
